== Notes for [[Item:Q2340|Q2340]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE PERFORMED THE ASHWAMEDHA YAJNA, BUT AS THE RITUALS WERE CONCLUDING A RAKSHASA TRICKED HIM INTO SERVING HUMAN MEAT TO BRAHMINS, INCLUDING RISHI VASISHTA. HE WAS THEN CURSED BY BRAHMINS. HE WANTED TO CURSE THEM BACK, BUT HIS WIFE PREVENTED HIM. HE SPENT TWELVE YEARS IN EXILE IN THE FOREST.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D5898E51EFBBFC9A22EF79916B167D


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
